headline: Dow Jones Component's Spinoff Joins S&P 500. Shares Jump.
summary: Honeywell's aerospace spinoff will be added to the S&P 500 index next week, while IES Holdings, a data center electric power provider, is going into the Midcap S&P 400. Both stocks rallied. Honeywell Aerospace will be officially in the S&P 500 at the start of trading on Monday, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Tuesday.

headline: Alphabet replacing Verizon in Dow Jones Industrial Average index
summary: Alphabet Inc (NASDAQ:GOOG) will join the Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon Communications Inc (NYSE:VZ, XETRA:BAC), in a reshuffle that further increases the index’s exposure to large-cap technology companies. headline: HONEYWELL AND MIT FIND DIGITAL TECHNOLOGIES CAN HELP INCREASE ENERGY SUPPLY, REDUCE ENERGY PRODUCTION COST BY TENS OF BILLIONS ANNUALLY
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON), in collaboration with the MIT Center for Sustainability Science and Strategy, today released new research titled Accelerating Energy Expansion, which shows that digital and AI-enabled technologies can significantly reduce the cost of fuel production annually, citing applications across traditional oil-based fuels and LNG.

headline: Tony Bancroft: We are going to see a lot more missile production
summary: Tony Bancroft, Portfolio Manager at Gabelli Funds, says rising geopolitical risks are driving demand for missiles, aircraft and naval assets. He favors Honeywell, L3Harris and Albany International.

headline: Honeywell (HON) Plans Aerospace Spinoff And Honeywell Technologies Rebrand
summary: Honeywell International is preparing to spin off Honeywell Aerospace into a separate, publicly traded company while rebranding the parent as Honeywell Technologies. The separation and rebranding will be accompanied by index changes, with Honeywell Aerospace set to join the S&P 500 and S&P 100 and the parent retaining a major index role under its new name. Board reshuffling, including resignations and new appointments tied to the spin off, highlights the scale of the governance and oversight...
